title: convolvulus arvensis var. obtusifolius
intro: Convolvulus arvensis var. obtusifolius, also known as the field bindweed or lesser bindweed, is a perennial climbing plant that belongs to the morning glory family (Convolvulaceae). It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of soothing the respiratory system and reducing inflammation. Convolvulus arvensis var. obtusifolius can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
